# dokku_domain (Resource)

Manages a single global Dokku domain (`dokku domains:add-global`), used as a default vhost suffix for apps.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
